message:
feat(s3): refactor authentication to support credential ID mode + add health check

- Extract bearer token logic into apply_auth() helper for consistency
  across all HTTP methods (GET, PUT, COPY, DELETE, HEAD)
- Add health_check() method performing lightweight list buckets probe
- Introduce S3Config struct with strict auth parameter validation:
  requires exactly one of (access_key_id + secret_access_key) or
  credential_id
- Add DoctorResult/DoctorCheck/DoctorStatus types for structured
  readiness diagnostics
- Support X-FCP-Credential-ID header for egress proxy authentication

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
